name: nepalicalendar
documentation: UNKNOWN

modules.name: nepalicalendar.events
documentation: Defines different constant events in nepali and english calendar
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-

modules.name: nepalicalendar
documentation: -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

modules.name: nepalicalendar.values
documentation:
Defines different constant values for use in
nepalicalendar
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-

modules.name: nepalicalendar.nepcal
documentation: Defines the NepCal class
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-

classes.name: nepalicalendar.nepcal.NepCal

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepcal.NepCal.weekday
documentation: Returns the weekday of the date. 0 = aaitabar

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepcal.NepCal.monthrange
documentation: Returns the number of days in a month

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepcal.NepCal.itermonthdates
documentation:
Returns an iterator for the month in a year
This iterator will return all days (as NepDate objects) for the month
and all days before the start of the month or after the end of the month
that are required to get a complete week.

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepcal.NepCal.itermonthdays
documentation: Similar to itermonthdates but returns day number instead of NepDate object

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepcal.NepCal.itermonthdays2
documentation: Similar to itermonthdays2 but returns tuples of day and weekday.

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepcal.NepCal.monthdatescalendar
documentation: Returns a list of week in a month. A week is a list of NepDate objects

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepcal.NepCal.monthdayscalendar
documentation:
Return a list of the weeks in the month month of the year as full weeks.
Weeks are lists of seven day numbers.

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepcal.NepCal.monthdays2calendar
documentation:
Return a list of the weeks in the month month of the year as full weeks.
Weeks are lists of seven tuples of day numbers and weekday numbers.
Nepali calendar class.

modules.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate
documentation: Defines the NepDate class
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-

classes.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate.NepDate

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate.NepDate.__init__
documentation:
Initializer for NepDate
Params:
    year : Year of the date
    month : Month of the date
    day : Day of the date
English date is not updated in constructor. 'update' should
be called explicitly

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate.NepDate.__add__
documentation: Adds NepDate with timedelta object

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate.NepDate.__sub__
documentation:
Subtraction for NepDate. Subtraction can be done with either
timedelta object to obtain NepDate object or with NepDate object
to find timedelta object (number of days between the two dates)

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate.NepDate.ne_day
documentation: Day in nepali digits

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate.NepDate.ne_month
documentation: Month in nepali digits

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate.NepDate.ne_year
documentation: Year in nepali digits

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate.NepDate.from_ad_date
documentation: Gets a NepDate object from gregorian calendar date

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate.NepDate.from_bs_date
documentation: Create and update an NepDate object for bikram sambat date

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate.NepDate.today
documentation: Returns today's date in nepali calendar

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate.NepDate.fromtimestamp
documentation: Returns a NepDate object created from timestamp

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate.NepDate.weekday
documentation:
Returns weekday for the date.
0 : Aaitabar
6 : Sanibar

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate.NepDate.en_weekday
documentation:
Returns weekday with each week starting in monday
monday = 0
sunday = 7

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate.NepDate.en_weekday_name
documentation: Gets the weekday name in English language. For eg. Aaitabar

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate.NepDate.weekday_name
documentation: Gets the weekday name in Nepali language. For eg. आइतवार

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate.NepDate.weekday_name_short
documentation: Gets the short weekday name in nepali language. For eg. आइत for आइतवार

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate.NepDate.en_month_name
documentation: Gets the name of month in english language. For eg. Baisakh

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate.NepDate.month_name
documentation: Gets the name of month in nepali language. For eg. बैशाख

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate.NepDate.ne_tithi_name
documentation: Nepali name for the tithi

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate.NepDate.events_list
documentation: Returns the events today

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate.NepDate.events_name
documentation: Returns the name of events

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate.NepDate.is_event_holiday
documentation: Returns if it is holiday due to an event today

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate.NepDate.is_holiday
documentation:
Returns if it is holiday today
It is holiday if it is sanibar or if there is some
event

methods.name: nepalicalendar.nepdate.NepDate.update
documentation: Updates information about the NepDate
Nepali Date class that implements a single nepali date

modules.name: nepalicalendar.functions
documentation: Provides nepali calendar related functions
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-

functions.name: nepalicalendar.functions.check_valid_ad_range
documentation: Checks if the english date is in valid range for conversion

functions.name: nepalicalendar.functions.check_valid_bs_range
documentation: Checks if the nepali date is in valid range for conversion

functions.name: nepalicalendar.functions.nepali_number
documentation: Convert a number to nepali

modules.name: nepalicalendar.tithis
documentation:
Defines tithis to be used by Nepali Calendar.
Currently, there is no way of automatically determining
tithi of Nepali Date. If you know of any way, feel free to contribute.
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-
